mapper.select:
/* intrTempInqy1011 : 기안문 양식 목록 조회 */ SELECT T.TEMP_CD , T.TEMP_NM , T.TEMPTYPE_CD , T.DISP_ORDER , T.REMARK , '1' AS LV , 'Y' AS ISLEAF , COUNT(T.TEMP_CD) OVER() AS LIST_CNT , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY T.TEMP_CD ASC) AS NUM FROM TEMPLATE T WHERE 1=1
AND T.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(T.TEMP_NM),'[^0-9가-힣A-Za-z]*','') LIKE '%'||REGEXP_REPLACE(LOWER(#{srchNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}),'[^0-9가-힣A-Za-z]*','')||'%'
ORDER BY T.TEMP_CD ASC
/* intrTempInqy1021 : 기안문 양식 상세 조회 */ SELECT T.TEMP_CD , T.TEMP_NM , T.TEMP_CONT , T.TEMPTYPE_CD , T.USE_YN FROM TEMPLATE T WHERE 1=1 AND T.TEMP_CD = #{tempCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
